gun._comment: Hit_Damage = Base_Dmg * (1 + (power_lvl * archers_scale)) * (1 + attr / scaling) * (1 + (proj_vel - gun_vel) / gun_vel)
gun._comment2: Note: Projectile damage is internally divided by bullet velocity so actual velocity variance can be explicitly calculated on impact.
gun._usage: Example: Set 'damageScalingFactor' to control the attribute strength (higher factor = less bonus).
